name: Zircon Hub responsive structure baseline

breakpoints.label: Desktop 1568x1003
breakpoints.workspace_rule: Complete Topbar, Sidebar, Workspace, and Bottom strip are visible.

breakpoints.label: Compact Window
breakpoints.workspace_rule: Workspace content compresses before shell ownership changes.

breakpoints.label: Collapsed Sidebar
breakpoints.workspace_rule: Sidebar width collapses while navigation ownership remains in the Sidebar lane.

invariants: Topbar owns global source, task status, account, and window controls.
Sidebar owns primary navigation and the Engine Status card.
Workspace owns page title, toolbar, cards, tables, and page content.
Bottom strip owns button-state visual samples.
Overlays float above the shell and do not consume layout space.
